signals.raw:
Strait of Hormuz Reopened to Commercial Shipping | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Iranian Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi announced the immediate reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, triggering a Bitcoin spike to a two-month high of ~$77,400 (+5% on Friday) and Ethereum climb to $2,440, with traditional markets (S&P 500, Nasdaq records) rallying amid plunging oil prices.[1]
